title: Support turf establishment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support turf establishment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to establish a planted area

pcs.text: Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery for planting according to turf establishment program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery for planting according to turf establishment program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery for planting according to turf establishment program.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures and operator instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures and operator instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures and operator instructions.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and implement controls in consultation with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and implement controls in consultation with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and implement controls in consultation with supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability of, fit and use personal protective equipment.
